name: Agency for Persons with Disabilities (APD)
description: Florida state agency serving individuals with developmental disabilities including autism, cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, and intellectual disabilities through waiver programs and community supports.

name: Florida Early Steps
description: Part C early intervention program for infants and toddlers birth to 36 months with developmental delays or established conditions.

name: The Arc of Florida
description: Statewide nonprofit advocating for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities, with local chapters offering direct services throughout Florida.

name: Special Olympics Florida
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities at locations across Florida.

name: Disability Rights Florida
description: Federally designated protection and advocacy organization providing free legal services to Floridians with disabilities.

name: Florida Respite Coalition
description: Statewide coalition connecting family caregivers with respite care providers and resources for temporary relief.

name: Camp Boggy Creek
description: Year-round camp for children with serious illnesses and disabilities, providing free medically supervised camp experiences.

name: Florida Alliance for Assistive Services and Technology (FAAST)
description: Florida's assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, equipment loans, and training for individuals with disabilities.

name: Florida ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged savings program allowing Floridians with disabilities to save without impacting eligibility for public benefits.

name: Florida Medicaid Waiver Programs (iBudget)
description: Home and community-based Medicaid waiver program providing individualized budgets for services for individuals with developmental disabilities.

name: LYNX ACCESS LYNX Paratransit (Orlando)
description: Paratransit transportation service for individuals with disabilities in the greater Orlando area who cannot use fixed-route bus service.

name: Florida Housing Finance Corporation - Accessible Housing
description: State housing agency providing information on accessible and affordable housing options for individuals with disabilities throughout Florida.

name: UF Health Developmental Pediatrics
description: Developmental and behavioral pediatrics at the University of Florida providing evaluations, diagnosis, and treatment for children with developmental concerns.

name: Easter Seals South Florida Pediatric Therapy
description: Comprehensive pediatric therapy services including physical, occupational, speech, and behavioral therapy for children with disabilities.

name: Florida Division of Vocational Rehabilitation - Employment
description: State vocational rehabilitation program providing employment services, job training, and placement for Floridians with disabilities.

name: Miracle League of South Florida
description: Adaptive baseball league providing opportunities for children with disabilities to play baseball on a custom-designed accessible field.
